notes: Exceptionally strong artefact that correctly frames the problem as a member experience and regulatory compliance gap, surfaces all material regulatory risks (FMA SEN, PDS amendment, fee scheme amendment, unit registry settlement), produces a tightly bounded MVP with explicit deferrals, and names six genuine uncertainties with risk-if-wrong consequences; minor deductions for D2 (hardship cohort members and compliance officer/board personas named in the spec are absent or only gestured at) and D6 (attrition and operations baselines are unknown, reducing two of five indicators to directional-only).
